description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named bins that runs on push to the master branch, excluding the docs directory, and also allows calling as a reusable workflow. The workflow has two jobs, build-musl and build-macos, which run on ubuntu-latest and macos-12 respectively. The build-musl job builds a musl package using a Docker container, while the build-macos job builds a macOS package using Homebrew. Both jobs upload artifacts and release assets.
